description_long: This is a compact, modern drip coffee machine with a matte black exterior and a rounded rectangular shape. The main body houses a transparent glass carafe with a black handle, positioned on a circular hot plate. The top section is solid and slightly curved, while the back features a vertical water level indicator. A single red power button is located on the lower front right, and the base is broad for stability. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible branding except for a small 'GOX' marking on the front base.
description: A sleek, matte black drip coffee machine with a glass carafe and a single red power button. It features a modern, minimalistic design with a visible water level indicator on the back.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the glass carafe, hot plate, and red power button on the lower right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the smooth, curved back and the vertical water level indicator.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the carafe handle and the open brewing area.
description_view_3: Direct front view with the carafe handle centered and the 'GOX' marking visible at the base.
attribute_brand_logo: A small 'GOX' marking is visible on the front base of the machine.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A single round red power button is located on the lower right front of the base; no other controls are visible.
